inputs.label: Inlet Pressure
inputs.businessContext: The absolute pressure at compressor inlet, typically atmospheric pressure (1 bar).

businessContext_i18n.en: The absolute pressure at compressor inlet, typically atmospheric pressure (1 bar).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kompresör girişindeki mutlak basınç, tipik olarak atmosfer basıncı (1 bar).
businessContext_i18n.de: Der absolute Druck am Verdichtereinlass, typischerweise Atmosphärendruck (1 bar).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pression absolue à l'entrée du compresseur, généralement la pression atmosphérique (1 bar).
businessContext_i18n.es: Presión absoluta en la entrada del compresor, típicamente presión atmosférica (1 bar).
businessContext_i18n.ar: الضغط المطلق عند مدخل الضاغط، عادةً الضغط الجوي (1 بار).

inputs.label: Outlet Pressure
inputs.businessContext: The desired discharge pressure after compression.

businessContext_i18n.en: The desired discharge pressure after compression.
businessContext_i18n.de: Der gewünschte Austrittsdruck nach der Verdichtung.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pression de refoulement souhaitée après compression.
businessContext_i18n.es: Presión de descarga deseada después de la compresión.

inputs.label: Flow Rate (Inlet Conditions)
inputs.businessContext: Volumetric flow rate at inlet pressure and temperature.

businessContext_i18n.en: Volumetric flow rate at inlet pressure and temperature.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Giriş basıncı ve sıcaklığındaki hacimsel debi.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Débit volumétrique à la pression et température d'entrée.
businessContext_i18n.es: Caudal volumétrico a presión y temperatura de entrada.
businessContext_i18n.ar: معدل التدفق الحجمي عند ضغط ودرجة حرارة الدخول.

inputs.label: Adiabatic Index (k)
inputs.businessContext: Ratio of specific heats (Cp/Cv) for the gas, typically 1.4 for air.

businessContext_i18n.en: Ratio of specific heats (Cp/Cv) for the gas, typically 1.4 for air.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Gazın özgül ısı oranı (Cp/Cv), tipik olarak hava için 1.4.
businessContext_i18n.de: Verhältnis der spezifischen Wärmen (Cp/Cv) für das Gas, typischerweise 1,4 für Luft.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Rapport des chaleurs spécifiques (Cp/Cv) pour le gaz, typiquement 1,4 pour l'air.
businessContext_i18n.es: Relación de calores específicos (Cp/Cv) del gas, típicamente 1.4 para aire.
businessContext_i18n.ar: نسبة السعات الحرارية (Cp/Cv) للغاز، عادةً 1.4 للهواء.

inputs.label: Compressor Isentropic Efficiency
inputs.businessContext: Efficiency of the compressor in converting adiabatic work to shaft work.

businessContext_i18n.en: Efficiency of the compressor in converting adiabatic work to shaft work.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kompresörün adyabatik işi mil işine dönüştürme verimliliği.
businessContext_i18n.de: Wirkungsgrad des Verdichters bei der Umwandlung von adiabater Arbeit in Wellenarbeit.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Efficacité du compresseur à convertir le travail adiabatique en travail sur l'arbre.
businessContext_i18n.es: Eficiencia del compresor para convertir trabajo adiabático en trabajo en el eje.
businessContext_i18n.ar: كفاءة الضاغط في تحويل الشغل الأدياباتي إلى شغل عمود.

inputs.label: Motor Efficiency
inputs.businessContext: Efficiency of the electric motor driving the compressor.

businessContext_i18n.en: Efficiency of the electric motor driving the compressor.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kompresörü tahrik eden elektrik motorunun verimliliği.
businessContext_i18n.de: Wirkungsgrad des Elektromotors, der den Verdichter antreibt.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Efficacité du moteur électrique entraînant le compresseur.
businessContext_i18n.es: Eficiencia del motor eléctrico que acciona el compresor.
businessContext_i18n.ar: كفاءة المحرك الكهربائي الذي يقود الضاغط.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.

rules.message: Outlet pressure must be greater than inlet pressure.
Adiabatic index must be greater than 1.
Compressor efficiency must be between 0 and 100.
Motor efficiency must be between 0 and 100.
